hint.main: Type a sentence and press Enter. Shift+Enter saves it as a phrase.
placeholder.input: Type what you want to say…
status.nativeTtsFailed: Could not start the native TTS engine.
status.piperMissing: Piper is not installed or the binary path is wrong.
status.deleteOnlyList: Phrase deletion works only when the phrase list is focused.
status.restartForLanguage: Please restart the app to fully apply the language change.
help.shortcuts:
Typing
Enter — speak text in the input field
Shift+Enter — save text as a phrase
Tab — switch between typing and the phrase list

Phrase list
Enter — speak selected phrase
Up/Down — select phrase
Numbers 1–9 — quickly select and speak a visible phrase

Folders and phrases
Right click — more actions
Drag phrase onto folder — move into folder
status.piperInstalled: Piper runtime installed. You can now download and select a Piper voice.
status.pythonMissing:
Python 3 was not found.

Install Python 3 from python.org and enable 'Add python.exe to PATH', or install/use MSYS2 UCRT64 Python.

Then try installing Piper again.
status.dropPhraseHint: Drag a phrase onto a folder to move it.
status.typingMode: Typing mode — Enter speaks the text.
status.phraseMode: Phrase mode — arrows select a phrase, Enter speaks it, Tab returns to typing.
status.folderDeleted: Folder deleted. Phrases were moved to General.
status.loadedPhrase: Phrase loaded into the input field.
dialog.deleteFolderQuestion: Delete this folder? Phrases inside will be moved to General.
about.text:
Dosty Speak

Version: %1
Author: %2
License: %3

A cross-platform phrase based text-to-speech app.

This program is open-source software released under the MIT License.
firstRun.intro: Let’s set up the app for first use.
firstRun.nativeHint: System/native voice is the safest first choice. Piper can be installed now if you select a Piper voice.
firstRun.piperInstallAsk: You selected a Piper voice. Dosty Speak can install/repair Piper runtime now and then download the selected voice. This can take a while. Continue?
menu.resetSetup: Reset settings and open setup wizard…
dialog.resetSetupQuestion: This will delete Dosty Speak settings, phrases, downloaded voices, Piper runtime and bundled Python runtime, then open the first-run setup wizard again. Continue?
status.piperAlreadyInstalled: Piper runtime already exists, reusing it.
status.voiceAlreadyDownloaded: Voice model already exists, selecting it.
status.voiceDownloadFailed: Voice download failed. Check internet connection and try again.
status.voiceNotFound: Selected voice was not found in the voice catalog.
status.installingEmbeddedPython: Installing bundled official Python for Dosty Speak…
status.piperExeMissing: Piper installation finished, but piper.exe was not found.
